message:
fix(writing): restore section-level #cost id, rename SectionHeader to #cost-heading

The earlier duplicate-id fix (b9a2f65) moved the #cost anchor to the
SectionHeader's inner data-anchor div. When TOC-jumped to, the scroll
landed on a small div rather than the section itself, which under load
was racing the 3s viewport toPass in the TOC E2E. Putting the anchor
on the section again gives scrollIntoView a tall element to target.

The SectionHeader id is renamed to cost-heading to keep ids unique.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -598,10 +598,10 @@ export function WillsEstateArticle() {
       <Divider />
 
       {/* ========== HOOK + COST TABLE ========== */}
-      <section data-section="cost" className="pb-10 md:pb-14">
+      <section id="cost" data-section="cost" className="pb-10 md:pb-14">
         <EC>
           <SectionHeader
-            id="cost"
+            id="cost-heading"
             eyebrow="The pitch"
             title="One weekend, roughly $120, instead of $20,000."
           />
